subtasks.description: Identify publishers with declining spend from Q3 to Q4 2024. Show publishers where Q4 spend is less than Q3 spend.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-07-01' AND event_date < '2024-10-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q3_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q4_spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-07-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY publisher HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-07-01' AND event_date < '2024-10-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) ORDER BY (SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-07-01' AND event_date < '2024-10-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END)) DESC
